overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from GTA V, navigating through Los Santos on a sunny day. The rider stops at intersections, proceeds through palm-lined residential streets, and passes commercial areas with the downtown skyline visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential intersection with stop sign and crosswalk

events.description: pedestrian crosses the crosswalk from right to left in front of the motorcycle
motorcycle accelerates from stop and proceeds through the intersection

agents.ego_description: waiting at stop sign for pedestrian to cross, then accelerating through the intersection

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing crossing the street from right to left

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign on the right side of the intersection
yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on the asphalt
single-story suburban homes with front yards lining the street
tall palm trees lining both sides of the residential street

segments.scene_description: Stopped at a residential intersection with a stop sign visible on the right. A pedestrian crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk in front of the motorcycle. After the pedestrian clears, the motorcycle accelerates through the intersection, passing single-story homes and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined residential avenue approaching railroad crossing

events.description: approaching railroad crossing with warning signals and tracks becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: driving straight down the palm tree-lined avenue, following a silver sedan ahead

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: railroad crossing signals and tracks crossing the road ahead
wooden utility poles with power lines running along the right side of the street
tall glass and steel skyscrapers visible in the distant background

segments.scene_description: Driving straight down a residential avenue lined with dense palm trees on both sides. The camera follows a silver sedan ahead while approaching a railroad crossing. The downtown skyline with tall skyscrapers becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with railroad tracks and traffic signals

events.description: stopped at red traffic light at the railroad crossing intersection
traffic light turns green and vehicles begin to proceed

agents.ego_description: stopped at the intersection waiting for the traffic light to change, observing the downtown skyline ahead

notable_agents.action: person standing on the sidewalk corner near the traffic light

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light above the intersection
bright yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk to the right
purple commercial sign for Family Bar on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Stopped at a major intersection with railroad tracks crossing the road. The traffic light is red, and the downtown skyline is prominently visible ahead. A yellow fire hydrant and commercial signs line the right sidewalk while waiting for the light to turn green.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corridor with fast food and retail

events.description: passing from residential area into commercial zone with restaurants and shops

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the green light and driving past commercial buildings and fast food restaurants

entered.detail: fast food establishment with yellow and red signage including Mr. Donald's
commercial gas station with canopy and fuel pumps
large commercial billboard visible above the buildings on the left

segments.scene_description: Driving through the intersection into a commercial corridor lined with fast food restaurants, gas stations, and retail establishments. The downtown skyline fades from view as the motorcycle proceeds past various commercial signage and palm trees.

events.description: making a right turn at the intersection into a residential side street

agents.ego_description: slowing down and executing a right turn at the intersection, then continuing down the residential street

notable_agents.action: person walking on the sidewalk approaching the intersection from the right

entered.detail: small commercial building at the corner of the intersection
vehicles parked along the left side of the residential street

segments.scene_description: Making a right turn at an intersection into a quieter residential neighborhood. A pedestrian walks along the sidewalk on the right as the motorcycle navigates the turn and continues past parked cars and single-family homes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet residential neighborhood through a bustling commercial corridor and back into a peaceful suburb. It begins stopped at a residential intersection, waiting for a pedestrian to cross a yellow-striped crosswalk before accelerating past single-story homes and palm trees. As the motorcycle proceeds down a palm-lined avenue, the camera follows a silver sedan toward a railroad crossing while the downtown skyline emerges in the distance. The scene then pauses at a red light by the tracks, where a yellow fire hydrant and commercial signs line the sidewalk, before the rider pushes forward into a dense commercial zone filled with gas stations and fast food restaurants. Finally, the downtown skyline fades from view as the camera makes a right turn, transitioning away from the retail corridor and back into a quiet neighborhood of parked cars and single-family homes.
